iti86:1.3: "Dhammānudhammapaṭipannassa bhikkhuno ayamanudhammo hoti veyyākaraṇāya – dhammānudhammapaṭipannoyanti bhāsamāno dhammaññeva bhāsati no adhammaṁ, vitakkayamāno vā dhammavitakkaññeva vitakketi no adhammavitakkaṁ, tadubhayaṁ vā pana abhinivejjetvā upekkhako viharati sato sampajāno"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti86:1.4:
"Dhammārāmo dhammarato,
dhammaṁ anuvicintayaṁ;
Dhammaṁ anussaraṁ bhikkhu,
saddhammā na parihāyati.
iti86:1.5:
Caraṁ vā yadi vā tiṭṭhaṁ,
nisinno uda vā sayaṁ;
Ajjhattaṁ samayaṁ cittaṁ,
santimevādhigacchatī"ti.
iti86:1.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
